{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46629", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Description

`IntlExtension` memoises every `\IntlDateFormatter` and `\NumberFormatter` it creates in instance-level arrays keyed on a hash that includes `locale`, `pattern`, `attrs` and other values that are ordinary named arguments of the `format_datetime` / `format_date` / `format_time` / `format_number` / `format_currency` filters. There is no size limit and no eviction.

A template that iterates over many distinct `pattern` (or `locale`, or `grouping_used`, ...) values therefore allocates one ICU formatter object per distinct value and pins it for the entire lifetime of the `Twig\Environment`. Because ICU allocates its backing buffers outside the Zend memory manager, this growth is not bounded by `memory_limit`. On long-running runtimes (RoadRunner, Swoole, FrankenPHP worker mode, ReactPHP) where the `Environment` outlives a single request, the cache also accumulates across requests.

### Resolution

The formatter caches are now bounded in size (100 entries each) and evict on a FIFO basis.

### Credits

Twig would like to thank Claude Mythos Preview (via Project Glasswing) for reporting the issue and providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00302, "percentile": 0.22129}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:23:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46629"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:23:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/security/advisories/GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/twig/intl-extra/CVE-2026-46629.yaml", "https://symfony.com/cve-2026-46629", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/twigphp/Twig/security-advisories/GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig", "summary": "twig/intl-extra: Unbounded formatter memoisation in keyed on template-controlled arguments", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T21:23:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-35wc-cvqg-78fp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.26.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "twig/intl-extra"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.26.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: twig/intl-extra: Unbounded formatter memoisation in keyed on template-controlled arguments
